title: Power Perspectives 2022
content:
## Power Perspectives 2022
Canada’s power sector had an eventful 2021, as the federal and provincial governments sharpened their focus on addressing the effects of climate change with various regulations and initiatives aimed at transitioning to a greener economy or achieving net-zero targets. Last year also saw the continued emergence of clean and renewable energy sources like hydrogen and nuclear, fuelling growth and investment in these spaces and creating an abundance of opportunities and challenges for public and private project proponents and other industry stakeholders moving forward.
Gain insights into the latest trends and developments that could affect your business by reading our Power Perspectives 2022 report. McCarthy Tétrault’s Power Group provides an in-depth overview of policy shifts, case law, and regulatory changes at the provincial and federal levels to help you take stock of potential opportunities and risks. We examine the following topics and more:
- Provincial regulatory and policy updates
- Environmental law trends and developments
- Aboriginal law developments
- Energy litigation and applicable case law updates
- SMRs: Renewed support for nuclear power in Canada
- Canada’s evolving electricity grids: Recent developments in distributed energy resources
- Unlocking the potential of hydrogen: Canadian developments in the drive to net zero

### Power Perspectives 2022
In 2021, several long-awaited developments occurred that will lay the groundwork for BC’s energy future.
Our Power Group provides clients with comprehensive, business-minded advice that reflects the peculiarities of the sector, mitigates business risks, and advances even the most complex goals. We have worked on more power projects than any other Canadian law firm. Our experience includes successfully advising on the development and/or financing of more than 100 power projects and more than 50 wind power projects in North America. We have seen every kind of transaction and project structure and have helped devise unique legal solutions that have set precedents for the industry. With an unequalled understanding of the challenges and opportunities in the sector, we creatively solve complex legal issues, apply best practices, and foresee potential risks and challenges to protect our clients’ interests. Read more about how we can help you.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information on McCarthy Tétrault or any of the above, please contact media@mccarthy.ca
